items.title: Trump storms out of interview after being challenged about election fraud claims, DOJ fund
items.title_zh: Trump storms out of interview after being challenged about election fraud claims, DOJ fund
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：President Donald Trump stormed out of a taped interview on NBC's "Meet the Press" after being pressed on his controversial "weaponization" fund and on evidence of his persistent claims of election fraud.；Trump sat with NBC's Kristen Welker for a taped interview on a Wisconsin farm that touched on the Iran war, potential interest rate hikes, and the $1.776 billion "weaponization" fund that could financially compensate convicted violent rioters who attacked police officers on Jan.；6, 2021.
important_points: President Donald Trump stormed out of a taped interview on NBC's "Meet the Press" after being pressed on his controversial "weaponization" fund and on evidence of his persistent claims of election fraud.

Trump sat with NBC's Kristen Welker for a taped interview on a Wisconsin farm that touched on the Iran war, potential interest rate hikes, and the $1.776 billion "weaponization" fund that could financially compensate convicted violent rioters who attacked police officers on Jan.

items.title: These are the market’s new hot stocks as investors flee from tech
items.title_zh: These are the market’s new hot stocks as investors flee from tech
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Investors are suddenly dumping technology stocks and rotating into other areas — including health insurers, banks and retailers.
important_points: Investors are suddenly dumping technology stocks and rotating into other areas — including health insurers, banks and retailers.

items.title: Here are the 6 big things we're watching in the stock market this week
items.title_zh: 本周股市关注的6大要点
items.summary: 市场对利润季结束后的热点数据和公司事件做出了强烈反应。苹果即将推出新AI助手，iPhone股价连续上涨，投资者预期高。宏观政策动向如美联储利率决策也在影响市场。整体趋势显示投资者高度关注，需密切跟踪公司公告和经济指标。
important_points: 利润季结束后市场情绪依然高涨
苹果发布AI助手预告，股价上升12.5%
宏观政策如美联储利率调整影响预期

items.title: Inflation inside the electronics you buy may soon become a bit more sticky
items.title_zh: Inflation inside the electronics you buy may soon become a bit more sticky
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Anyone with evergreens in their yard probably knows the familiar feeling of putting their hand on the trunk and coming away with a sticky film on their fingers.；This sticky stuff is better known as resin.；Under the right conditions, tree resin hardens.
important_points: Anyone with evergreens in their yard probably knows the familiar feeling of putting their hand on the trunk and coming away with a sticky film on their fingers.
This sticky stuff is better known as resin.
Under the right conditions, tree resin hardens.

items.title: Women often outlive men. Here's how they should approach their long-term care needs
items.title_zh: Women often outlive men. Here's how they should approach their long-term care needs
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：For women, living longer than men on average comes with a financial risk that experts say is worth preparing for — outliving their spouses and needing long-term care services.；About 57% of Americans who reach age 65 will develop a disability serious enough to require long-term care, according to a 2022 report from the Health and Human Services Department.；Roughly 1 in 4 women — 26% — will need such care for longer than five years, compared with 17.5% of men.
important_points: For women, living longer than men on average comes with a financial risk that experts say is worth preparing for — outliving their spouses and needing long-term care services.
About 57% of Americans who reach age 65 will develop a disability serious enough to require long-term care, according to a 2022 report from the Health and Human Services Department.
Roughly 1 in 4 women — 26% — will need such care for longer than five years, compared with 17.5% of men.

items.title: My husband and I are 75. We have $1.5 million in stocks and $425,000 in savings. Is that too much cash?
items.title_zh: My husband and I are 75. We have $1.5 million in stocks and $425,000 in savings. Is that too much cash?
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：“We are debt-free, and he will get 80% of his salary when he retires.”
important_points: “We are debt-free, and he will get 80% of his salary when he retires.”

items.title: 管涛：全球外汇交易格局的变与不变︱汇海观涛
items.title_zh: 管涛：全球外汇交易格局的变与不变
items.summary: 全球外汇交易格局发生新变化，美元与人民币份额并提升，关税政策推动交易增长，新加坡份额显著上升。数据显示市场对美元贬值的反应，显示国际货币体系多极化发展趋势。
important_points: 美元和人民币交易份额均上升，占比持续增长。
关税政策引发交易规模显著增加，尤其是远期和期权产品。
新加坡外汇交易份额明显提升，集中度保持稳定。

items.title: IPO周报：一周新增受理8单IPO申请，好达电子第二次冲刺科创板
items.title_zh: IPO周报：新增8单IPO申请，好达电子第二次冲刺科创板
items.summary: 近期IPO受理情况加速，沪深北交易所新增8单IPO申请，显示市场活跃。公司股票融资增长显著，未来业绩面临风险。
important_points: 本周新增8单IPO申请显示市场活跃，融资量大幅提升。
好达电子第二次冲刺科创板，融资目标达到了18.36亿元。
公司未来业绩存在波动风险，需关注竞争与市场环境。

items.title: 国债期货主力合约午盘全线下跌
items.title_zh: 国债期货主力合约午盘全线下跌
items.summary: 市场反应强烈，国债期货全线下跌，显示投资者对利率预期变化的担忧。数据显示10年期和5年期合约均有明显下跌，显示短期波动。机构分析指出科技方向可能带动市场反弹。
important_points: 国债期货全线下跌，显示市场波动
10年期和5年期合约均有显著跌幅
机构预测科技方向可能引导市场反弹
港股交易额缩水，库存水平维持
